scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields identified in gold standard (name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources) plus extensive optional fields matching gold standard list. Examples are well-structured and accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'parts' section with charm plugin is presented as required but gold standard doesn't list it as required. 'uid'/'gid' on containers attributed to Juju 3.5+ and 'charm-user' to Juju 3.6+ — these version attributions cannot be verified against gold standard. 'charm-strict-dependencies' in parts may not be a real field. Otherwise content aligns well with gold standard.
